title: Amazon CloudFormation Stack
description: Schema representing an Amazon CloudFormation stack, which is a collection of AWS resources that you can manage as a single unit.

StackName.description: The name associated with the stack.

ChangeSetId.description: The unique ID of the change set.

Description.description: A user-defined description associated with the stack.

Parameters.description: A list of Parameter structures that specify input parameters for the stack.

CreationTime.description: The time at which the stack was created.

DeletionTime.description: The time the stack was deleted.

LastUpdatedTime.description: The time the stack was last updated.

StackStatusReason.description: Success or failure message associated with the stack status.

DisableRollback.description: Boolean to enable or disable rollback on stack creation failures.

NotificationARNs.description: Amazon SNS topic ARNs to which stack related events are published.

TimeoutInMinutes.description: The amount of time within which stack creation should complete.

Capabilities.description: The capabilities allowed in the stack.

RoleARN.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of an IAM role that CloudFormation assumes to create the stack.

Tags.description: A list of tags associated with the stack.

EnableTerminationProtection.description: Whether termination protection is enabled for the stack.

ParameterKey.description: The key associated with the parameter.

ParameterValue.description: The input value associated with the parameter.

UsePreviousValue.description: During a stack update, use the existing parameter value.

ResolvedValue.description: Read-only. The value that corresponds to a SSM parameter key.

OutputKey.description: The key associated with the output.

OutputValue.description: The value associated with the output.

Description.description: User defined description associated with the output.

ExportName.description: The name of the export associated with the output.

RollbackConfiguration.description: Structure containing the rollback triggers for CloudFormation to monitor during stack creation and updating operations.

RollbackTriggers.description: The triggers to monitor during stack creation or update actions.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the rollback trigger.

Type.description: The resource type of the rollback trigger.

MonitoringTimeInMinutes.description: The amount of time to monitor during rollback.

StackDriftInformation.description: Contains information about whether the stack drift detection has been performed and the status.

StackDriftStatus.description: Status of the drift detection operation.

LastCheckTimestamp.description: Most recent time when a drift detection operation was initiated.

StackResource.description: A resource that is part of a CloudFormation stack.

StackName.description: The name associated with the stack.

LogicalResourceId.description: The logical name of the resource specified in the template.

PhysicalResourceId.description: The name or unique identifier that corresponds to a physical instance ID.

ResourceStatusReason.description: Success or failure message associated with the resource.

Description.description: User defined description associated with the resource.
